name: Glycyrrhizin Isolated
summary: Glycyrrhizin is the major triterpenoid saponin from licorice with anti-inflammatory and regional hepatology use. Its safety profile is limited by pseudoaldosteronism risk.
description: Isolated licorice constituent that inhibits 11β-HSD2 and can increase cortisol-like mineralocorticoid effects; some regional use for chronic hepatitis markers.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
